name: Chili Oil
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat a wok or skillet over high heat and add the oil.
2. Continue heating until the oil begins to smoke. Remove the pan from the heat.
3. Add the chiles and peppercorns to the cooled mixture. Allow it to cool undisturbed.
4. Pour the mixture into a jar. Let it sit for 2 days, covered.
5. Strain the oil. It will keep indefinitely.
Makes 2/3 Cup
KEN HOM
PRODIGY GUEST CHEFS COOKBOOK
